function: Encodes lactase enzyme hydrolyzing lactose into glucose/galactose
diet_recommendations: Limit lactose to tolerance level (small dairy amounts if heterozygous); lactose-free dairy; pair with probiotics; monitor gut symptoms via diary.
nutrient_supplements: Lactase-rich yogurt/kefir (probiotic fermented dairy); leafy greens like kale (for calcium); fatty fish like sardines (for vitamin D).
restricted_food: High-lactose dairy (milk, soft cheeses, ice cream); cream-based soups; chocolate milk promoting bloating/gas.

function: Regulates LCT gene expression for lactase persistence
diet_recommendations: Emphasize lactose-free alternatives (almond/oat milk fortified); aged hard cheeses (low lactose); gradual dairy reintroduction if tolerant.
nutrient_supplements: Sauerkraut/kimchi (for probiotics); broccoli/fortified plant milks (for calcium); egg yolks/sun-exposed mushrooms (for vitamin D).
restricted_food: Fresh milk/soft ice cream; sweetened yogurts; processed cheese spreads causing diarrhea/cramping.
